args: const { slugStats } = require('./apps/textstats/slugStats.cjs'); const r = slugStats('Hello hello world!'); if (r.words !== 3 || r.uniqueWords !== 2 || r.slug !== 'hello-hello-world') throw new Error(JSON.stringify(r)); try { slugStats(123); throw new Error('expected TypeError'); } catch (error) { if (!(error instanceof TypeError)) throw error; } console.log('slugStats verification ok');

## Required Contract

Complete the work item described by the staged source artifacts.

- Do not edit outside allowedPaths.

{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":40146,"duration_api_ms":36958,"num_turns":9,"result":"계약(`contract.slug-stats.module`)에 따라 `apps/textstats/slugStats.cjs`에 모듈을 구현했습니다.

**구현 요약:**
- `slugStats(input)` 명명 export, CommonJS 시그니처
- 문자열이 아닌 입력은 `TypeError` 발생 (AC-001)
- `{ words, uniqueWords, slug }` 반환 (AC-002)
- 소문자화, 비-영숫자 구두점을 분리자로 사용, 반복 단어를 슬러그에 보존, 의존성 없음 (AC-003)
- 검증 입력 `'Hello hello world!'` → `{ words: 3, uniqueWords: 2, slug: 'hello-hello-world' }` (sequence diagram 일치)
